title: Migrated mobile footer behavior mapping
description: Observed on migrated localhost preview at 375×812; compared to phase-4-mobile.json by compare-footer-mobile-behavior.js

accordionExpandMode.description: single | multi | none — must match phase-4 accordionDetails.expandMode

stackingOrderLength.description: Count of sections in mobile stacking order (must match phase-4 stackingOrder.length)

stackingOrder.description: Optional; stackingOrderLength may be derived from this array if stackingOrderLength omitted
